zh.lifeSummary: 當Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont於大約1095年出生在法國時，她的父親Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene26歲，母親Agatha De Nevers31歲。她和Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont于大约1095年出生在法国时，她的父亲Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene26岁，母亲Agatha De Nevers31岁。她和Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
English (Kent): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegmund.
German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): variant of   Beaumont  .
Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Roscelin
meanings: A female name, found written Joscelyne and Jocelin, and by corruption Joscelind. A diminutive formed from Latin Justus. The German name Jost is rendered Joscelin.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont was born about 1095, in France, her father, Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene, was 26 and her mother, Agatha De Nevers, was 31. She had at least 1 son with Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont est née environ 1095, à France, son père, Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agatha De Nevers, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont um 1095 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene 26 und ihre Mutter Agatha De Nevers 31. Sie hatte mit Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont è nata il circa 1095 nel Francia, sua padre, Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Agatha De Nevers, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumontが約1095年にフランスで生まれた時，父Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayeneは26歳，母Agatha De Neversは31歳であった。彼女はSir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumontとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont(이)가 대략 1095년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha De Nevers(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em França, seu pai, Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agatha De Nevers, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont родилась около 1095 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha De Nevers, 31. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mrs Roscelin Richard de Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1095, en Francia, su papá, Raoul de Beaumont V de Mayene, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agatha De Nevers, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Roscelin Richard Vicomte de Maine De Beaumont.
